name: workflow-and-MCP-and-plugins
description: Local development marketplace for the workflow-orchestrator plugin (17-skill engineering workflow with bundled codex-bridge MCP, named stages, and opt-in auto-merge) and the mcp-note-ingest plugin (writable bridge into a Markdown vault).

plugins.name: workflow-orchestrator
plugins.description: Orchestrates a 17-skill engineering workflow inside Claude Code, with Codex review handoffs via a bundled codex-bridge MCP server and opt-in named stages plus --auto-merge.

plugins.name: mcp-note-ingest
plugins.description: MCP server for ingesting chat notes and artifacts into a Markdown vault (Inbox/...).
